title: kayea borneensis
intro: Kayea borneensis is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae, commonly known as the Borneo Kayea. It is a tree native to Borneo, and its bark and leaves have been traditionally used in medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Kayea borneensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine in the region. Herbal preparations of Kayea borneensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas, tonics, and other remedies.
